description: Nick from Helios discusses their developer platform on Solana, focusing on a new compression solution for tokens and accounts. This allows for mass distribution of tokens at a low cost, potentially around 5 to 10 SOL for 1 million tokens.
topic_summary: Helios is building a developer platform on Solana that offers a compression solution for tokens and accounts, enabling cost-effective mass distribution of tokens [t=7:24].
